problem: Clinical trial data capture is fragmented across multiple systems, with complex EDC platforms that are difficult to use and slow to deploy, delaying research timelines.
solution: Unified eClinical data management platform with EDC (electronic data capture), eCOA/ePRO, eConsent, and decentralized clinical trial capabilities. Self-service platform that enables study deployment in weeks with 100% customer satisfaction and 50,000+ users.
